message:
fix(ci): fix output variables bug in checksum-health workflow

Bugs fixed:

1. **Checksum outputs not always set** (checksum-health.yml):
   - If modules_healthy=false but healthy=true, issue creation would
     run but checksum values (actual_ubs, expected_ubs, etc.) were
     undefined because they were only set inside the healthy=false block
   - Moved output writes before the conditional so they're always set

2. **Missing stderr suppression** (test-suite.yml):
   - Added 2>/dev/null and || echo "" fallback to grep commands
   - Makes behavior consistent with other workflow files

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,15 +52,17 @@ jobs:
             ERRORS="${ERRORS}install.sh checksum mismatch\n"
           fi
 
+          # Always output the checksum values (needed for issue body even if only modules fail)
+          echo "actual_ubs=$ACTUAL_UBS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "expected_ubs=$EXPECTED_UBS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "actual_install=$ACTUAL_INSTALL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "expected_install=$EXPECTED_INSTALL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
           if [[ -n "$ERRORS" ]]; then
             echo "healthy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             echo "errors<<EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             echo -e "$ERRORS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
-            echo "actual_ubs=$ACTUAL_UBS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
-            echo "expected_ubs=$EXPECTED_UBS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
-            echo "actual_install=$ACTUAL_INSTALL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
-            echo "expected_install=$EXPECTED_INSTALL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
           else
             echo "healthy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             echo "::notice::All checksums are healthy"

@@ -34,8 +34,8 @@ jobs:
           echo "Verifying SHA256SUMS integrity..."
           ACTUAL_UBS=$(sha256sum ubs | awk '{print $1}')
           ACTUAL_INSTALL=$(sha256sum install.sh | awk '{print $1}')
-          EXPECTED_UBS=$(grep '  ubs$' SHA256SUMS | awk '{print $1}')
-          EXPECTED_INSTALL=$(grep '  install.sh$' SHA256SUMS | awk '{print $1}')
+          EXPECTED_UBS=$(grep '  ubs$' SHA256SUMS 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || echo "")
+          EXPECTED_INSTALL=$(grep '  install.sh$' SHA256SUMS 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || echo "")
 
           FAIL=0
           if [[ "$ACTUAL_UBS" != "$EXPECTED_UBS" ]]; then
